/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ot-engine.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/ot-engine.dir/src/apply.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ot-engine.dir/src/compose.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ot-engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ot-engine.dir/src/operation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ot-engine.dir/src/pipeline.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ot-engine.dir/src/transform.cpp.o" -o ot-engine
